feed.title: The Git Times
feed.subtitle: AI-generated newspaper for builders — daily coverage of trending GitHub projects

entry.title: Antigravity Awesome Skills Arms AI Agents with 1,273 Battle-Tested Coding Playbooks
entry.summary: “Science is what we understand well enough to explain to a computer; art is everything else.” — Donald Knuth

entry.title: AirI Unleashes Self-Hosted AI Companions That Play Games and Chat in Real Time
entry.summary: “At each increase of knowledge, as well as on the contrivance of every new tool, human labour becomes abridged.” — Charles Babbage

entry.title: PinchTab Gives AI Agents Lightning-Fast Control Over Chrome Browsers
entry.summary: “The best programs are written so that computing machines can perform them quickly and so that human beings can understand them clearly.” — Donald Knuth

entry.title: One CLI Masters Google Workspace APIs Dynamically for Devs and AI Agents
entry.summary: “Programs are meant to be read by humans and only incidentally for computers to execute.” — Donald Knuth

entry.title: Open-Source World Monitor Delivers Palantir-Like Global Intelligence Dashboard
entry.summary: “In mathematics you don't understand things. You just get used to them.” — John von Neumann

entry.title: Desloppify Harnesses AI Agents to Sculpt Sloppy Code into Beautiful Engineering
entry.summary: “Before you become too entranced with gorgeous gadgets, remember that the greatest invention of all was the book.” — Arthur C. Clarke

entry.title: Reverse-Engineered APIs Unlock Neural Training on Apple Neural Engine
entry.summary: “Sometimes it is the people no one imagines anything of who do the things that no one can imagine.” — Alan Turing

entry.title: Claude Context Mode Compresses Tool Outputs to Salvage AI Context Windows
entry.summary: “Premature optimization is the root of all evil.” — Donald Knuth

entry.title: CoPaw Launches as Self-Hosted AI Assistant for Developers
entry.summary: “Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.” — Arthur C. Clarke

entry.title: OpenClaw's memory-lancedb-pro Plugin Supercharges Agent Memory with Hybrid Retrieval
entry.summary: “Errors using inadequate data are much less than those using no data at all.” — Charles Babbage
